title: bromus inermis subsp. reimannii
intro: Bromus inermis subsp. reimannii, also known as smooth brome or Reimann's brome, is a subspecies of the perennial grass species Bromus inermis. It is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, and has been naturalized in North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Bromus inermis subsp. reimannii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and have been used to support overall health and well-being, with benefits including reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function.
